variants.title: Mann Filter W 811/80 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P555522
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 811/80 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P555522
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 80.0 mm, Dimension B: 57.0 mm, Dimension C: 65.0 mm, Dimension G: M20x1.5, Dimension H: 75.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.0 bar, No. Anti-Drain Back Valves: 1, Outer Diameter: 79.3 mm, Length: 98.3 mm, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.8 BAR

variants.title: Donaldson P555522 Lube Filter, Spin-On Full Flow
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P555522 Lube Filter, Spin-On Full Flow
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P555522 Lube Filter, Spin-On Full Flow delivers reliable engine lubrication by efficiently removing contaminants from engine oil. This full-flow design ensures consistent oil purity, helping to minimize engine wear and maintain peak performance over extended operating periods. The spin-on format allows for quick, hassle-free installation and replacement, reducing maintenance time. Built to withstand high pressures and demanding conditions, this filter is an ideal solution for both on-road and off-road engines requiring robust oil filtration.
specifications: Style: Lube Filter, Spin-On Full Flow, Outer Diameter: 79.3 mm, Length: 98.3 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.8 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.8 BAR

variants.title: Fleetguard LF3361 Lube Filter, Full-Flow Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P555522
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard LF3361 Lube Filter, Full-Flow Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P555522
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3361 spin-on lube filter meets or exceeds OE performance requirements and the new challenges of modern engine technology.
specifications: Style: Lube Filter, Spin-On Full Flow, Outer Diameter: 79.3 mm, Length: 98.3 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.8 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.8 BAR
